title: agent-toolkit acceptance-probes (v2)
description: Probe registry consumed by evidence_audit, auto_falsify, auto_run_probes, gap-fix-cycle, spec-vs-evidence-diff. v2 adds explicit `runner` block so AGENT can execute probes without manual-browser PENDING + adds auto_run + recipe_drift_tolerance.

required_tools.description: Tool names that count as evidence for this probe. Built-ins: real-data-proof, manual-browser, code-grader. Custom: mcp__<server>__<tool>. evidence_audit also recognizes patterns from .agent-toolkit/evidence_audit_config.json.additional_evidence_patterns.

type.description: Runner type used by .codex/tools/falsify.py. `playwright` requires Node; `playwright_python` uses Python playwright (no Node); `mcp_call` invokes an MCP tool and asserts output.

description.description: Human-readable falsification recipe. Used by spec-vs-evidence-diff to detect drift between recipe and script.

auto_run.description: If true, auto_run_probes PostToolUse hook fires this probe whenever an Edit on a matching path_glob lands. If false, probe only runs via /run-probes or auto_falsify precommit.

recipe_drift_tolerance.description: spec-vs-evidence-diff sensitivity. strict = warn on any token mismatch; loose = warn only on critical token mismatch (server actions, RPC names, freeze methods).
